chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) from instance_bill where (ProductCode = 'sls' or ProductCode = 'slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) is not null and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) from instance_bill where  (ProductCode = 'sls' or ProductCode = 'slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) is not null and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) from instance_bill where  (ProductCode = 'sls' or ProductCode = 'slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) is not null and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select DISTINCT OwnerId from instance_bill where  (ProductCode = 'sls' or ProductCode = 'slsingest')

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select t, cost as "Expenses Yesterday", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "percent" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d') as t FROM instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%'  group by t order by t asc) limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select t, cost as "Expenses Yesterday", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "percent" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_format(__time__, '%Y-%m-%d') as t FROM instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'  group by t order by t asc) limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select t, cost as "Expenses This Month", (cost-lag(cost, 1, 0) over())/lag(cost, 1, 0) over()*100 as "percent" FROM  (select sum(PretaxAmount) as cost, date_trunc('month', __time__)  as t FROM  instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%' group by t order by t asc) limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "Data Transformation" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and (BillingItem like '%数据加工%' or BillingItem like '%Data Transformation%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%' group by t order by t asc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage*1024*1024*1024) as "Data Transformation" ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and (BillingItem like '%数据加工%' or BillingItem like '%Data Transformation%') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' group by t order by t asc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *  | select date_trunc('day', __time__)  as "date", billingItem, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "cost" from instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%' and OwnerId like '%%'  group by "date",billingItem order by "date"   limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *  | select date_trunc('day', __time__)  as "date", billingItem, round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "cost" from instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}' and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'  group by "date",billingItem order by "date"   limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
* |
select
  date_trunc('day', __time__) as "date",
  round(sum(Usage), 3) as "Usage",
  case
    when UsageUnit = '' then billingItem
    else concat(billingItem, ' (', UsageUnit, ')')
  end as billingItem
from instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
group by
  "date",
  billingItem
order by
  "date"
limit
  1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
* |
select
  date_trunc('day', __time__) as "date",
  round(sum(Usage), 3) as "Usage",
  case
    when UsageUnit = '' then billingItem
    else concat(billingItem, ' (', UsageUnit, ')')
  end as billingItem
from instance_bill where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
group by
  "date",
  billingItem
order by
  "date"
limit
  1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
(
  *
) | with 
t1 as (
select             split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project
FROM            instance_bill
		  where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%' group by Region,Project
),

t2 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    round(di [1], 3) as "Expenses",
    concat(
      cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar),
      '%'
    ) "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase"
  from(
      select
        Region,
        Project,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
            sum(PretaxAmount) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
		  where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
        )
      group by
        Region,
        Project
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    max_by("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
			split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        round(sum("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
 round(sum("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)", 
round(sum("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
round(sum("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
			InstanceID,
          	case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
          FROM            instance_bill
		  where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            t,
			InstanceID,
            "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
        )
      group by
        t,
        Region,
        Project
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    Region,
    Project
),
t4 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
	"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
  from(
          select
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
)
      group by
        Region,
        Project,
"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
		(ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%'
        and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
      group by
        Project,
        Region,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."Expenses" as "Expenses (USD)",
  t2."Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase" as "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase (%)",
  t3."Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)",
  t4."Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage" as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.Project = t2.Project and t1.Region = t2.Region
  left join t3 on t1.Project = t3.Project and t1.Region = t3.Region
  left join t4 on t1.Project = t4.Project and t1.Region = t4.Region
  left join t5 on t1.Project = t5.Project and t1.Region = t5.Region
order by
 "Expenses (USD)" desc
limit
  150
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
(
  *
) | with 
t1 as (
select             split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project
FROM            instance_bill
		  where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}' group by Region,Project
),

t2 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    round(di [1], 3) as "Expenses",
    concat(
      cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar),
      '%'
    ) "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase"
  from(
      select
        Region,
        Project,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
            sum(PretaxAmount) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
		  where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
        )
      group by
        Region,
        Project
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    max_by("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
			split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        round(sum("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
 round(sum("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)", 
round(sum("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
round(sum("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
			InstanceID,
          	case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
          FROM            instance_bill
		  where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            t,
			InstanceID,
            "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
        )
      group by
        t,
        Region,
        Project
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    Region,
    Project
),
t4 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
	"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
  from(
          select
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
            split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            Region,
            Project
)
      group by
        Region,
        Project,
"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
		(ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%'
        and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
      group by
        Project,
        Region,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."Expenses" as "Expenses (USD)",
  t2."Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase" as "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase (%)",
  t3."Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)",
  t4."Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage" as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.Project = t2.Project and t1.Region = t2.Region
  left join t3 on t1.Project = t3.Project and t1.Region = t3.Region
  left join t4 on t1.Project = t4.Project and t1.Region = t4.Region
  left join t5 on t1.Project = t5.Project and t1.Region = t5.Region
order by
 "Expenses (USD)" desc
limit
  150

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
(*) | with 
t1 as (
select
split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore
FROM            instance_bill
          where
            (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            InstanceID
),

t2 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    round(di [1], 3) as "Expenses",
    concat(cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar), '%') "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase"
  from(
      select
        InstanceID,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            InstanceID,
            round(sum(PretaxAmount), 2) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
          where
            (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            InstanceID
        )
      group by
        InstanceID
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    max_by("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
        InstanceID,
        round(sum("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
        round(sum("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
        round(sum("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
        round(sum("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
            InstanceID,
          	case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
          FROM            instance_bill
          WHERE
            (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
            t,
            InstanceID,
            "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
        )
      group by
        t,
        InstanceID
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    InstanceID
),
t4 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
	"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
  from(
          select
    			InstanceID,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and 
 split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
          group by
    InstanceID
)
      group by
    InstanceID,
"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    Logstore,
    InstanceID,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
        (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%' and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '%%' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '%%'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '%%'and OwnerId like '%%'
      group by
        InstanceID,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t1.Logstore as Logstore,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."Expenses" as "Expenses (USD)",
  t2."Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase" as "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase (%)",
  t3."Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)",
  t4."Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage" as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.InstanceID = t2.InstanceID
  left join t3 on t1.InstanceID = t3.InstanceID
  left join t4 on t1.InstanceID = t4.InstanceID
  left join t5 on t1.InstanceID = t5.InstanceID
order by "Expenses (USD)" desc
limit
  150000
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
(*) | with 
t1 as (
select
split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore
FROM            instance_bill
          where
            (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            InstanceID
),

t2 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    round(di [1], 3) as "Expenses",
    concat(cast(round(di [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar), '%') "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase"
  from(
      select
        InstanceID,
        compare(cost, 2592000) as di
      FROM        (
          select
            InstanceID,
            round(sum(PretaxAmount), 2) as cost
          FROM            instance_bill
          where
            (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            InstanceID
        )
      group by
        InstanceID
    )
),
t3 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
    max_by("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
max_by("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)", t) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
  FROM    (
      select
        t,
        InstanceID,
        round(sum("Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
        round(sum("Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
        round(sum("Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
        round(sum("Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"), 2) as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
      from(
          select
            date_trunc('day', __time__) as t,
            InstanceID,
          	case
              when (BillingItem ='存储空间' or BillingItem='存储空间-日志存储' or BillingItem ='Storage Usage of Log Data' or BillingItem ='Used Storage Space of Log Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志低频存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of IA Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-日志归档存储' or BillingItem = 'Storage Usage of Archive Storage Tier') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
            case
              when (BillingItem = '存储空间-时序存储' or BillingItem = 'Used Storage Space of Time Series Data') then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage
              else 0
            end as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
          FROM            instance_bill
          WHERE
            (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
            t,
            InstanceID,
            "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
"Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)"
        )
      group by
        t,
        InstanceID
      order by
        t asc
    )
  group by
    InstanceID
),
t4 as (
  select
    InstanceID,
	"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
  from(
          select
    			InstanceID,
             round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage * ListPrice), 2) as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
          FROM            instance_bill
          where (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest') and 
 split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
          group by
    InstanceID
)
      group by
    InstanceID,
"Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
),t5 as (
  select
    Region,
    Project,
    Logstore,
    InstanceID,
    concat(BillingItem, ' (', Unit, ')') BillingItem,
    Usage
  from(
      select
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) as Region,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) as Project,
        InstanceID,
        split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) as Logstore,
        BillingItem,
        arbitrary(UsageUnit) as Unit,
        sum(Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage) as Usage
      FROM        instance_bill
      where
        (ProductCode='sls' or ProductCode='slsingest')
        and BillingItem not like '%存储空间%' and BillingItem not like '%Storage%'
and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 3) like '${{Logstore|%%}}' and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 2) like '${{Project|%%}}'and split_part(InstanceID, ';', 4) like '${{Region|%%}}'and OwnerId like '${{OwnerId|%%}}'
      group by
        InstanceID,
        UsageUnit,
        BillingItem
    )
)
select
  t1.Region as Region,
  t1.Project as Project,
  t1.Logstore as Logstore,
  t5.BillingItem as BillingItem,
  t5.Usage as Usage,
  t2."Expenses" as "Expenses (USD)",
  t2."Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase" as "Expenses/Month-on-Month Increase (%)",
  t3."Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Space(Hot Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(IA Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Archive Storage)(GB)",
  t3."Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)" as "Storage Size(Time Series)(GB)",
  t4."Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage" as "Expenses Deducted By ResourcePackage"
FROM  t1
  left join t2 on t1.InstanceID = t2.InstanceID
  left join t3 on t1.InstanceID = t3.InstanceID
  left join t4 on t1.InstanceID = t4.InstanceID
  left join t5 on t1.InstanceID = t5.InstanceID
order by "Expenses (USD)" desc
limit
  150000
